title: Blue eye brown eye
wikitext:
[]: Blue eye, brown eye             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 4:58 pm I put this in "chat" because its not actual "discussion" I've tried using Search and Google for this but "Asuka" is too common a word and keeps screwing it up: I've heard that the reason the theory that "Asuka" at the end of the movie is really a mix of her and all the major female characters, was disproven, is because the "cel animation" for that shot (before it was shaded) clearly shows that her eye is "blue" and not really "brown" does someone have a link to a pic of that cel animation on-hand? I can't seem to find it anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:35 pm http://evacommentary.org/episode-m26/episode-m26-scene12.html#cut480

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:53 pm http://evacommentary.org/episode-m26/m26_C480_c_big.jpg well that seems to be a screenshot of the scene I mean does anyone have a pic of the "cel animation from a card that was later sold as just cel animation" that shows that here eye is blue

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 24, 2009 6:46 pm Twsa'teotu wrote: http://evacommentary.org/episode-m26/m26_C480_c_big.jpg well that seems to be a screenshot of the scene I mean does anyone have a pic of the "cel animation from a card that was later sold as just cel animation" that shows that here eye is blue

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 8:19 pm - Screenshot - Card - Collector's Disc Note that most, if not all, of the Collector's Disc images for EoE are affected by oversaturated colors and super-high contrast. Disappointing, really.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 24, 2009 10:34 pm Besides, take our word for it, it's bogus. The only reason it keeps coming back is because of the Manga DVD commentary.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 10:46 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The only reason it keeps coming back is because of the Manga DVD commentary.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Feb 25, 2009 5:08 am I like to think that Shinji in the final scene is an amalgamation of the entire male cast. Complete with white pubes a la Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Wed Feb 25, 2009 9:42 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Besides, take our word for it, it's bogus. The only reason it keeps coming back is because of the Manga DVD commentary.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Feb 25, 2009 10:45 am I would dismiss the idea even if Asuka did have brown eyes at the end. The theory turns on its head everything that had just happened right up to that point, i.e. the return of AT Fields, and thus everyone's individualty. It's a theory that only appeals to people who were paying no attention at all to what was actually being said and shown in the previous ten minutes of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 25, 2009 2:19 pm Indeed. If Asuka for some strange reason DID have brown eyes, one could, of course, propose various other bullshit-explanations for precisely why. E.g., Asuka for some reason "imagined herself in her heart" as having brown eyes, so that's how she came back. If 3I ever happens, and fails, I'm going to try imagining myself into having brown eyes, too, just to see if it works.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 25, 2009 5:34 pm Reichu wrote: If 3I ever happens, and fails, I'm going to try imagining myself into having brown eyes, too, just to see if it works.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Feb 25, 2009 6:13 pm Doesnt light blue under red incident light look brown?
summary: []: Blue eye, brown eye             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 4:58 pm I put this in "chat" because its not actual "discussion" I've tried using Search and Google for this but "Asuka" is too common a word and keeps screwing it up: I've heard that the reason the theory that "Asuka" at the end of the movie is really a mix of her and all the major female characters, was disproven
